props.ChoiceText: You saw how often cavalry matters most after the line is already broken.
props.ChoiceBio: Pursuit after battle taught you that mounted war often finishes what infantry begins.

0.TransitionText: Because pursuit after battle taught you that mounted war often finishes what infantry begins, horseflesh, speed, and shock remained your proper element.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because pursuit after battle taught you that mounted war often finishes what infantry begins, mounted reputation ripened into command.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because pursuit after battle taught you that mounted war often finishes what infantry begins, high war gave way to lower but more immediate pay.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone remembers what you did once the enemy had already broken.
